mapper.insert: INSERT INTO acd_sys_operation_log (username, usercode, roles, operation, create_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{usercode}, #{roles}, #{operation}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE acd_sys_operation_log SET username = #{username}, usercode = #{usercode}, roles = #{roles}, operation = #{operation}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
